calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Gregory S. Korman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Beneficial California, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
Pamela S. Peterson, Unit Manager for Housekey Financial Trust, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Joyce Ann Haynes, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on February 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 11, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following exhibits:

Exhibit 1---Loan Repayment and Security Agreement------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Deed of Trust------------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Reconveyance-------------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Payment History----------------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Payoff Demand Statement--------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Beneficial California, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Joyce Ann Haynes, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $388,003.89.
Prejudgment Interest $43,568.70.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - Per Cost Memorandum, for a total judgment in the amount of $431,572.59.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
